artifact_refs.description: Original manual notebook used to build the Zillow TC1 human baseline.
Run-level metadata for the canonical human baseline.

Author notes for the canonical human baseline.

notes: Human-authored TC1 selection updated from the current bank review. Selected join/date handling, a broad missing-value and value-stabilization bundle, conservative row filtering / deduplication, a small categorical encoding block, and a couple of basic transform actions for the from-scratch baseline.
